items.title: July 10, 1996: Charles Barkley competes in his final game at America West Arena as a member of the Phoenix Suns.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 10, 1996: Charles Barkley competes in his final game at America West Arena as a member of the Phoenix Suns.

Barkley—who scored 11 PTS in the U.S. Olympic team's 119-58 exhibition win over China—would be traded to the Houston Rockets on August 19, ending his four-year stint with the Suns.

items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
From last night's Fever win, notes on: 

-Hot shooting early
-Stars being stars
-Offensive execution
-AT, a challenging cover
-Poor late 2q defense
-Fouls galore
-Big responses
-5 scoreless minutes
-Confidence
-Ty Harris late
-A big final minute

items.title: Cam Reddish missed Orlando’s opening Las Vegas Summer League game because of a bone bruise in his right knee, @orlandosentinel.com has learned. It’s possible Reddish could play for the #Magic later in summer league but he’s considered out for now.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt: Cam Reddish missed Orlando’s opening Las Vegas Summer League game because of a bone bruise in his right knee, @orlandosentinel.com has learned. It’s possible Reddish could play for the #Magic later in summer league but he’s considered out for now.
